steps.title: Find the joined noun phrases
steps.content: The phrase after 'because of' has two coordinated objects: the country's millions of miles of waterways and the fact that the volume and speed can vary. No comma should split those two noun phrases.

steps.title: Remove unnecessary commas
steps.content: A, B, and C all insert commas inside that coordinated phrase, separating words that should stay together. The version with no comma correctly lets 'and' join the two objects of 'because of.' The answer is D.
